creator: ptarmigan@1-voip.net
text:
The (now integrated) lightning extension is lacking localization.

While the main user interface gets correctly localized, the calendar (and the correponding preferences tab) never get localized.

Problem comes from the files "chrome.jar" and "chrome.manifest" of the lightning extension which don't contain localization data (only en-US).

Replacing these with the appropriate files effectively corrects the problem.
